message:
🐛 Fix sidebar navigation + UI polish

- Restore client-side NavLink navigation (recharts removed, no more
  useSyncExternalStore infinite loops blocking startTransition)
- Remove yellow border from demo mode banner
- Solid background on pinned sidebar icon
- Reduce sidebar controls gap (36px → 20px)
- Remove Suspense wrapper around Outlet

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
